description: One-step agent repair benchmark with generic retry versus structured CONFIRM feedback.

initial_claims.question: In ADNI as discovery and OASIS3 as replication, are Dementia participants lower than CN in smri_hippocampus after age, sex, and eTIV adjustment?
In ADNI as discovery and OASIS3 as replication, are Dementia participants lower than CN in smri_entorhinal after age, sex, and eTIV adjustment?
In ADNI as discovery and OASIS3 as replication, are Dementia participants lower than CN in smri_wholebrain after age, sex, and eTIV adjustment?
In ADNI as discovery and OASIS3 as replication, is there a brain-wide sMRI atrophy pattern for Dementia versus CN across shared smri_ regions after age, sex, and eTIV adjustment?
In COBRE as discovery and FBIRN as replication, do SZ participants have lower fc_within_network than HC after age and sex adjustment?
Among CN participants only, using ADNI as discovery and OASIS3 as replication, is older age associated with lower smri_hippocampus after sex and eTIV adjustment?
As a site-confound null/control in ABIDE1, is fc_mean_abs different between site NYU and site UCLA_1 after age and sex adjustment, using ABIDE1 as the replication check?
In ABIDE1, do ASD participants differ from HC in fc_mean_abs after age and sex adjustment, using ABIDE1 as the replication check because no second ASD cohort is in this catalog?
Among CN participants only, using ADNI as discovery and OASIS3 as replication, do female participants have lower smri_hippocampus than male participants after age and eTIV adjustment?
